steps.title: Identify the depth threshold
steps.content: The passage defines the mesophotic zone as starting at 30 meters. The key signal is the species' ability to tolerate this zone, which hinges on their maximum depth being within or reaching 30 meters.

steps.title: Match the depth gap to the correct coral
steps.content:
Choice B identifies *Porites nodifera* with a maximum depth of 15 meters, which is furthest from the mesophotic zone’s 30-meter lower boundary.

The other choices either reference minimum depths (irrelevant here) or maximum depths closer to the threshold.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
